title: Technical Design for Claim Status Management Feature
response:
Feedback Summary (1 comments):

Specific Text Comments:
1. "- `PUT /claims/:id/mark-paid` → 200 ClaimResponseD...": Should use PATCH instead of PUT
Should use an endpoint to control the status change. In this case, should combile the 2 endpoints:
- `PUT /claims/:id/mark-paid` → 200 ClaimResponseDto
- `PUT /claims/:id/mark-sent` → 200 ClaimResponseDto
